keynotes.text: Uncommon mental activity; cannot stop thinking. Vision dim; from blur or film; objects mixed. Pain after using eyes; floating black spots, flashes of light, twitching of lids and muscles of eyes (Agar.); mystagmus. Great prostration of muscular system; impaired locomotion (Gels.). Tremors or trembling of young persons from mental or physical disturbances. Idiopathic or traumatic tetanus; brought on or by slightest breath of air from a person passing (Hyper., Lys., Nux, Strych.).
Relations. - Compare: Bell., Con., Cur., Gels., Hyper., Strych.
